title: Wireless Design, Configuration, and Validation · Protocol Clinic: Net Wireless Survey Roaming
summary: Design staff, guest, and point-to-point wireless service across crowded, regulated, and mobile spaces. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net wireless survey roaming increment in a secure wireless survey and deployment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Perform predictive and measured surveys and verify RSSI, SNR, interference, utilization, roaming, and application outcomes.
Choose directional or omnidirectional antennas and autonomous or lightweight AP management from coverage and operations needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Build Net Wireless Survey Roaming evidence
steps.instruction: Append a safe investigation headed "# Evidence: net-wireless-survey-roaming-77f7me" with a concrete hypothesis, one read-only network command, and an observation that changes the next decision.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Net Wireless Survey Roaming into observable performance evidence.
